title: Pine
description: New wood in Minecraft's Taiga! Adding gorgeous starter blocks, while remaining grounded in the vanilla feel.
body:
# 🍂 Pine
**Pine adds a new wood type to Minecraft! With a brand new tree & exciting new blocks, the feel of vanilla is kept while also majorly improving on it's early game resources available to the Taiga!**

# 🎨 Blocks
The new blocks are tailored to work well with Minecraft's existing palette, while also expanding it's limits. Pine Logs perfectly blend with Minecraft's earthy tones, such as Bricks & Terracotta. Pine Planks offer a contrast to Spruce's dark brown, while also blending in with the whiter blocks such as Snow, Diorite & Quartz.
![Showcasing the versatility of the blocks in 3 rows: (top) Copper Bulb & Spruce Log, (middle) Stripped Pine Log, Pine Wood & Pine Planks, (bottom) Spruce Planks & Bricks ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb55017fc86c073f7aec21744573a0355c69d319.png)
# 🌲 Trees
Pine trees can be found in the Taiga. Grounded in their vanilla look, they expand upon the look of the biome by adding more contrast and variation. Old Growth Forests will also feature a mega variant of the Pine tree.
![3 Pine trees of different height and widths, showing the versatility and vanilla look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ClKtylZf/images/843abd513e4ea7a1fdd97bc2dc4c3caaa01ab63f.png)


# 🛋️ Doors & Trapdoors
With its ornamental & see-through textures, both Pine Doors and Pine Trapdoors are perfectly suitable for the extra detail used on walls & lights, giving them a massive decorative purpose beyond their normal utilitarian use.
![On the left: Pine Double Doors, halfway open. On the right: Pine Trapdoor, halfway open.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ClKtylZf/images/8926bcc93806f0df1841fc2207d5811d67c48794.png)
